description: Canadian FHIR server platform for healthcare data exchange. Enterprise FHIR server with security, scalability, and integration capabilities. Used by health systems, payers, and health IT vendors for FHIR implementations.
business_model: B2B - FHIR server to healthcare organizations
target_market: Health systems, health plans, health IT vendors
competitive_advantage: Enterprise-grade FHIR, security certifications, global customers

varden_fit.rationale: FHIR infrastructure - validates enterprise FHIR server market
